notes: USB Type-C powered (1.5W); 750ml tank; two modes: continuous (18h max runtime) and intermittent (28h max runtime); mist output 30–50 ml/h; designed specifically for VGrow Smart Grow Box (46x46x122cm) and Clone Grow Tent (51x36x53cm); explicitly NOT compatible with GrowHub E42A controller; app control only through VGrow system integration; no humidity setpoint, VPD control, WiFi, or Bluetooth directly; cotton wick requires periodic replacement (replace when discolored/yellowed); water level probe included as auto shut-off sensor only
